visual_description: An older man with gray hair, wearing a light gray suit, is seated indoors and holding a phone to his ear with his right hand. He is slightly leaning forward, looking downward with his eyes closed or nearly closed, and his head is tilted slightly to his right. The background shows shelves with bowls and a dimly lit, rustic interior.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice speaking in a neutral tone, with a moderate pace and pitch, and no noticeable prosody or background noise.
